title: Hide Tab
description: This mod removes the ability to see player names in the TAB menu and prevents entering nicknames in chat.
body:
## 🕵️ HideTab - Full Anonymity

This mod is designed for those who want to hide their presence on a server or create a more hardcore, immersive atmosphere.

### **Core Features:**
* **Hidden Player List:** Pressing the `TAB` key no longer displays the player list. You won't be able to see who else is currently online.
* **Autocomplete Block:** The mod disables player name suggestions in the chat. You can no longer "scout" for players by simply starting to type their names.
* **Preserved Functionality:** Autocomplete for commands (starting with `/`) continues to work as usual.

### **Technical Details:**
* Developed specifically for **Minecraft 1.20.1**.
* Requires the **Forge** mod loader.
* Lightweight code with zero impact on performance (FPS).

*Perfectly suited for anarchy servers, streaming, or private roleplay (RP) sessions.*
